overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The journey begins in a covered commercial area with neon signage and Japanese text, transitions to a sunlit commercial street lined with palm trees and storefronts including 'BOHEMIA' and 'CALI EXPRESS', and continues toward an industrial zone with smokestacks and large metal framework structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial entrance with security gates and neon signage

events.description: approaching the exit of the covered building, transitioning toward outdoor light

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered commercial entrance with metal security gates and cyan neon signage

entered.detail: vertical metal bars with horizontal slats blocking the entrance
cyan neon Japanese characters indicating vacancy available
tall illuminated advertisement screen showing a hand holding a weapon
industrial metal bars and fencing with vertical slats

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered commercial entrance with industrial metal security gates and bright cyan neon signage. The camera moves forward through the doorway, approaching the transition to the outdoor environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with palm trees and neon storefronts

events.description: emerges from artificial lighting into bright midday sunlight
exits covered building onto a concrete ramp leading to street level

agents.ego_description: walking down a concrete ramp from an elevated entrance onto the sunlit street level

notable_agents.action: walking down the ramp ahead of the camera toward the street

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the commercial street
large bright pink neon sign with heart symbols and geometric patterns
circular blue and white sign with letter C logo
row of shops with colorful facades including green and red storefronts
modern street lighting with orange glowing bars

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered entrance into bright midday sunlight, descending a concrete ramp onto a commercial street lined with palm trees. The vibrant pink 'BOHEMIA' neon sign dominates the right side as pedestrians walk along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial sidewalk with multiple storefronts and pedestrians

events.description: camera moves closer to a pedestrian wearing a white vest with a black X symbol

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various shops and scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character in white vest with black X symbol walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red neon sign with Japanese characters and subtext
red storefront signage with white text
industrial building covered in colorful blue graffiti murals becoming visible in distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial sidewalk, the camera passes the red 'Kabuki' sign and various storefronts while pedestrians move in opposing directions. A character in a distinctive white vest with a black X symbol walks ahead, and a blue graffiti-covered building becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between commercial and industrial areas with graffiti buildings

events.description: crossing the street at an intersection with traffic lights
palm trees disappear from view as the environment becomes more industrial

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along a sidewalk next to a blue graffiti-covered industrial building

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk
red and white truck driving past on the street

entered.detail: overhead metal framework with orange and blue beams spanning the street
large vertical advertisement showing a face with futuristic styling
tall red and white striped smokestacks becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a mixed commercial-industrial zone as the camera crosses the street. The blue graffiti-covered building dominates the right side while industrial smokestacks and overhead framework structures appear in the distance. Vehicles pass by on the street as the palm trees fade from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial approach with large gate structure and shipping containers

events.description: red sedan drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking toward an industrial gate structure with smokestacks visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving along the street passing the camera

entered.detail: large metal framework gate with blue and orange horizontal beams marking district entrance
stacked blue and red industrial shipping containers
elevated pedestrian bridge or industrial walkway connecting buildings
tall factory chimneys emitting white smoke

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches an industrial zone marked by a large metal gate structure with orange and blue framework. Shipping containers line the right side while industrial chimneys emit smoke in the distance. The camera moves steadily forward through the increasingly industrial landscape with sparse vehicle traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered neon-lit entrance into a sun-drenched commercial district and finally into a gritty industrial zone. It begins inside a covered commercial doorway characterized by industrial security gates and bright cyan neon signage before emerging into the glare of midday sunlight. As the camera descends a concrete ramp, the environment opens into a vibrant street lined with palm trees and a prominent pink Bohemia sign, passing pedestrians and storefronts like the red Kabuki sign. The scene then shifts toward a mixed-use area as the camera crosses the street, leaving the palm trees behind and moving past a blue graffiti-covered building toward distant smokestacks. Finally, the landscape becomes fully industrial, moving through a zone of shipping containers and orange and blue metal framework structures while chimneys emit smoke in the distance.
